topic: Build an event-driven notification system across 4 files. Create events/emitter.js (EventEmitter class with on/off/emit), create events/logger.js (logs events to an array), wire the logger into the existing player.js so that level-ups and damage events are emitted, and register everything in events/index.js. Study player.js to understand its methods. Run "node test/events.test.js". When tests pass, call finish.
